purpose: Persistent ledger for downloaded literature sources, batch provenance, review state, and dedupe tracking.

processing_actions: Loaded a local markdown working note from data_sources/literature_working.
Generated initial knowledge, phrase, and trigger candidates as a compact seed batch.
Used as a seed source in the broader anxiety-stress-child batch.

documents.content_summary: Compact working note about anxiety-linked child/patient cue language and help-seeking phrasing.

next_actions: Review the 7 trigger candidates for false positives before any import.
Keep as a seed/reference batch rather than a primary remote-source handoff.

processing_actions: Downloaded three public NIMH HTML pages and combined them with the local patient-cues seed note.
Generated a large mixed batch before the improved HTML main-content filtering was added.
Left batch in review-only state because remote HTML boilerplate was still noisier at that time.

documents.content_summary: General NIMH overview of anxiety disorders, symptoms, treatment references, and help resources.
Public stress-oriented psychoeducation and coping guidance from NIMH.
Child and adolescent mental health overview, support guidance, and provider-facing advice.
Local seed text merged into the larger anxiety/stress/child review pack.

next_actions: If this batch becomes a serious import candidate, rebuild it with the improved HTML extractor.
Use it mainly as a broad source inventory until the cleaner rerun exists.

processing_actions: Downloaded two public NIMH HTML sources on anxiety and stress.
Generated a review-only batch before the improved HTML boilerplate filtering was added.
Kept in staging because trigger output was empty and phrase candidates required manual filtering.

documents.content_summary: NIMH overview of anxiety symptoms, research, and treatment pointers.
Stress-management and self-care educational material from NIMH.

next_actions: Prefer the newer cleaned batches for future import work.
Only revisit this batch if its exact source pairing is needed again.

processing_actions: Downloaded three public NIMH HTML sources on depression, self-care, and provider communication.
Rebuilt the batch after improving HTML extraction to focus on main content and strip boilerplate.
Reduced the batch from noisy 95 chunks to a cleaner 32 chunks / 43 phrase candidates.
Started manual triage in review_decisions.md to separate shortlist, rewrite-needed, and reject items.

documents.content_summary: Self-care basics, symptom thresholds for seeking help, support contact suggestions, and 988 references.
Depression definition, symptom impact, treatment/research context, and help/support routing.

documents.title_hint: Tips for Talking With a Health Care Provider About Your Mental Health
documents.content_summary: Practical help-seeking guidance: prepare questions, involve support people, be honest, ask about options.

next_actions: Continue candidate-level triage and identify import-ready phrases versus rewrite-needed phrasing.
Optionally derive a smaller help-seeking shortlist for locale import after manual wording adjustment.

processing_actions: Downloaded three public NIMH HTML sources on suicide prevention, warning signs, and action steps for supporting someone with suicidal thoughts.
Built the batch with the newer main-content HTML extraction logic.
Performed an initial manual triage to separate support-worthy crisis content from heading noise and research-only language.

documents.content_summary: NIMH overview of suicide prevention, evidence-based programs, help routing, and research directions.
Public warning-sign and help-seeking guidance for recognizing suicide risk.

documents.title_hint: 5 Action Steps to Help Someone Having Thoughts of Suicide
documents.content_summary: Action-oriented support guidance: ask directly, reduce lethal means, connect to 988, involve supports, and follow up.

next_actions: Split import-eligible supportive wording from tightly governed crisis or caregiver-only phrasing.
Consider adding a dedicated crisis review pass before any runtime promotion because several retained items describe suicide-specific intervention steps.

processing_actions: Downloaded the public NIMH ADHD topic page.
Generated staged chunks, knowledge snippets, and phrase candidates with the cleaned HTML extractor.

documents.content_summary: Definition, inattention/hyperactivity/impulsivity patterns, co-occurring conditions, and treatment/support options.

next_actions: Review for patient-safe executive-function and coping phrasing.
Look for short attention, organization, and overwhelm-support variants during curation.

processing_actions: Downloaded the public NIMH autism spectrum disorder topic page.

documents.content_summary: Overview of autism, communication and developmental differences, service needs, and support across the lifespan.

next_actions: Review for neurodiversity-respectful wording before any reuse.
Separate support-focused language from research-only descriptions.

processing_actions: Downloaded the public NIMH bipolar disorder topic page.

documents.content_summary: Mood episode overview, functional impact, stigma/help-seeking context, and treatment importance.

next_actions: Review for balanced, non-alarmist symptom wording.
Reserve psychosis- and mania-specific language for stricter safety review.

processing_actions: Downloaded the public NIMH borderline personality disorder topic page.

documents.content_summary: Emotion regulation difficulties, relationship strain, self-harm risk context, and treatment references including DBT.

next_actions: Require stricter review because the source contains self-harm-adjacent language.
Prefer supportive stabilization phrasing over diagnostic labels during later curation.

processing_actions: Downloaded the public NIMH COVID-19 and mental health topic page.

processing_actions: Downloaded the public NIMH disruptive mood dysregulation disorder topic page.
